title: Akhtang
summary: Akhtang (Russian: Ахтанг) is a shield volcano topped by a small basaltic stratovolcano located in the Sredinny Range on the Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia southeast of the Ichinsky volcano.
text: Akhtang (Russian: Ахтанг) is a shield volcano topped by a small basaltic stratovolcano located in the Sredinny Range on the Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia southeast of the Ichinsky volcano.
